issues.description: FlipLife is incorrect. Card text says 'add 1 card from top or bottom of Life cards to hand' - this is a retrieval action, not a flip. Should be a custom action or clarified as retrieving from Life pile.

SearchDeck is incorrect destination. Card specifies searching hand for {Supernovas} type Character with cost ≤5, then adding to top of Life cards face-up. Should filter by type AND cost, with destination as Life pile, not hand.
Filter missing type constraint. Must include 'type:{Supernovas}' or equivalent type filter in addition to cost filter.

Effect structure doesn't capture the conditional nature: 'You may add 1 card from Life to hand' is the condition enabling the second effect. Current DSL treats both as sequential unconditional actions.
